ideation: This animation sequence expresses affection and warmth, mirroring the feeling evoked by the purple heart emoji. The arms will move in a gentle, embracing motion, showcasing the caring nature of the emoji.  The sequence will start with arms slightly raised, palms facing each other, and then slowly bring them together in a gesture of embrace. The movement should be soft, avoiding any abrupt changes. It should end with both arms embracing in front of the chest. I will use slow, subtle changes between frames to emphasize the gentle nature of the gesture. The robot's two-joint arm system will be used to create a natural, flowing movement. Frame 1 will start with the arms slightly raised, palms facing each other. Frame 2 will show the arms moving closer, increasing the sense of embrace. Frame 3 will present the arms fully embracing, palms together. Frame 4 will show the arms in a slight relaxation, with the palms still together, and Frame 5 will be a slight widening of the embrace, palms still together.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, palms facing inwards
arms begin to draw closer, a gentle approach
arms meet and embrace softly in the center
the embrace holds steady, a warm gesture
the arms widen slightly, a loving embrace
